name: CloudConvert API
description: CloudConvert is an online file conversion API. It supports nearly all audio, video, document, ebook, archive, image, spreadsheet, and presentation formats. The API allows creating conversion jobs with multiple tasks, managing webhooks, and importing/exporting files from various sources.
